title: digitaria arenicola
intro: Digitaria arenicola, also known as beach finger grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is widely found in tropical and subtropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Digitaria arenicola include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are made by boiling the leaves and roots in water to create a medicinal tea or paste.
